name: CDK Global Automotive Dealer API
what_it_does: CDK Global REST API for automotive dealer management system (DMS) integration. Enables AI agents to access vehicle inventory and pricing, manage customer records and service appointments, retrieve finance and insurance (F&I) data, process repair orders in fixed operations, integrate dealer data with OEM systems and marketing platforms, and automate dealership workflows.
use_cases: Accessing live vehicle inventory and pricing from automotive shopping agents
Scheduling and managing service appointments from dealership operations agents
Retrieving customer and vehicle history from dealer CRM agents
Integrating repair order data with parts inventory from fixed operations agents
not_for: Non-automotive retail without dealer management workflows
Independent auto repair shops without franchised dealer integration needs
Direct OEM consumer applications without dealership intermediary
best_when: An automotive franchised dealership or dealer group using CDK Global DMS wants AI agents to automate appointment scheduling, inventory queries, customer communications, and fixed operations workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase and financial data is highly sensitive. CDK had a major cyberattack in June 2024 — verify current security posture and resilience improvements.

auth.notes: CDK Global uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. CDK AppDev program required for third-party integrations. Dealer-level credentials scoped per dealership. Partner certification required for production access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — DMS licensing plus AppDev program fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-dealership DMS licensing; AppDev partner program for third-party integration access
pricing.notes: Largest automotive DMS provider in North America. Acquired by Brookfield Business Partners. Major ransomware attack in June 2024 disrupted thousands of dealerships — security posture under significant scrutiny.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client and dealership; documented in AppDev portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase, finance, and service data is highly sensitive
SECURITY RISK: CDK suffered major ransomware attack June 2024 — verify current security posture
No public MCP server — REST API with CDK AppDev partner program required
AppDev partner certification required — not self-service for third-party integrations
Dealer-level scoping — credentials are per-dealership, not enterprise-wide
Legacy DMS architecture means some APIs use older patterns and data formats
agent_readiness.security_notes: SECURITY RISK: Major ransomware attack June 2024. Customer vehicle purchase and financial data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with dealer scoping. Verify current security posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vehicle purchase and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. Major 2024 ransomware incident — security posture under scrutiny.
